'''Tenn''' was a [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] stationed in the ops room of the [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|''Acclamator''-class Assault Ship]] ''[[Fearless]]''. He was the principle weapons officer. He aided [[Etain Tur-Mukan]] and [[Clone Commander/Legends|Clone Commander]] [[Gett]] in planning the rescue of [[Omega Squad]] by finding the optimum fire solution as ''Fearless'' decelerated out of hyperspace. Tenn fired two torpedos at a Separatist ship, destroying it and saving Delta and Omega. Commander Gett called Tenn "Peewo".

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' {{1st}}
